channel.title: Research notes — Julius Störk
channel.description: Interactive notes on continual learning and electrode manufacturing.

item.title: AI's Bottleneck is Physical
item.description: The next bottleneck in AI is physical: whether the loop from electricity through inference to actuation and back to sensors can run reliably, efficiently, and observably.

item.title: Reading CausalPFN: causal effects as in-context prediction
item.description: Notes on Balazadeh et al., CausalPFN: one transformer, trained on simulated identifiable DGPs, that estimates treatment effects in-context.

item.title: The geometry of forgetting in continual learning
item.description: Forgetting as interference energy under a task's feature covariance, and the IGFA controller.

item.title: Solving the electrode calendering U-shape puzzle
item.description: Why through-plane conductivity dips before it rises, and the closure that captures it.
